name: Vladimir Putin
title: President of the Russian Federation

compatibilityOverrides.reason: Strategic partnership as junior partner against Western hegemony
Deep adversarial relationship; NATO expansion grievance
Energy weaponization and security threat to Europe
Tactical alignment through shared opposition to Western dominance

biography: A former KGB officer who rose through the chaos of post-Soviet Russia, Vladimir Putin has ruled as the dominant figure in Russian politics for over two decades. His ISTP nature manifests in tactical opportunism, a preference for concrete action over abstract ideology, and a cold pragmatism in crisis. He views the collapse of the Soviet Union as a catastrophe to be reversed through strength.
